name: cloudmeter
description: Per-endpoint cloud cost attribution for Node.js web apps — see exactly what each API route costs on AWS, GCP, or Azure

scripts.test: node --test src/__tests__/reporter.test.js src/__tests__/express.test.js src/__tests__/fastify.test.js src/__tests__/cost-projector.test.js src/__tests__/dashboard-server.test.js
scripts.test:coverage: c8 --reporter=lcov --reporter=text --lines=80 --branches=70 --functions=80 node --test src/__tests__/reporter.test.js src/__tests__/express.test.js src/__tests__/fastify.test.js src/__tests__/cost-projector.test.js src/__tests__/dashboard-server.test.js
scripts.test:junit: node --test --test-reporter=./scripts/junit-reporter.mjs --test-reporter-destination=test-results.xml src/__tests__/reporter.test.js src/__tests__/express.test.js src/__tests__/fastify.test.js src/__tests__/cost-projector.test.js src/__tests__/dashboard-server.test.js
